description: Channel allowlist + blocklist for YouTube ranking. The pipeline applies these as ranking modifiers in run_pipeline.py:_rank_candidates().
_notes: allowlist channels get a +10 boost on the relevance dimension — they outrank generic results.
blocklist channels are dropped entirely from consideration.
Match is case-insensitive on the channel display name; partial-match by substring (so 'BiggerPockets Money' matches 'BiggerPockets').
Add channels here as you discover good/bad ones. The file ships in git so all clients get the same list via fork-sync.
allowlist: I Will Teach You To Be Rich
